channel.title: Car on Sami's Blog

item.title: Toyota Corolla E120 ethanol conversion.
item.description: Quick guide to install ethanol conversion kit (eFlexFuel) on 2002-2008 Toyota Corolla (E120). I was inspired by ChrisFix’s latest video on …

item.title: Tesla Model X speaker measurements
item.description: Here are some measurements of a Tesla Model X, with “basic” audio package (two speakers per door). I have also included the full REW …
